title: No runtime auto-update when a pinned custom-node commit bumps — installed nodes silently stay stale on both engines
description: Per-node version drift -> targeted auto-reinstall on boot, WITHOUT an engine wipe. node_lock.json pins each node's commit, but nothing records WHICH commit was installed and the install-check is folder-exists only (both engines) -> a node bump (MpiNodes bumps almost every release) leaves existing installs stale + silent. HARD CONSTRAINT (user): must NOT reinstall the ComfyUI engine for a node bump -- only the drifted node reinstalls (full engine wipe for a 1.76MB node is unacceptable; rejects the 'bump COMFY_VERSION' option). DESIGN = extend the existing boot-repair ladder, wiring not new machinery: (1) marker -- stamp <node_folder>/.mpi_node_commit = node_lock pinned commit at install (local); record node commit in wrapper manifest (remote). (2) drift check -- /engine/deps-status (local) + connect-edge syncModelInstalled/remoteModelsCheck (remote) compare marker vs pinned commit; fold drifted nodes into needsDepsInstall so the boot 'repairing' modal fires. (3) targeted reinstall -- feed drifted set into the existing per-dep path (local repair-deps -> startUniversalWorkflowInstall(set,true), no engine wipe; remote remoteInstallDep force/requirements_only): remove stale folder, re-fetch at pinned commit, re-run pinned reqs, re-stamp marker. UX = AUTO-APPLY via the same modal as the ComfyUI upgrade + boot repair (user: 'comfyui already does that, shouldn't be different'). BOTH ENGINES: local heals via engine deps-status/repair-deps; remote heals via the DIFFERENT connect-edge model-check + wrapper install path -- both need marker+check+reinstall (feedback_check_both_engine_paths; repo forgets the remote twin). ENABLER: move the 3 non-engine nodes (PainterI2Vadvanced no-reqs; ComfyUI-LTXVideo + RES4LYF already pipPinned) to installOnEngine -> one node class; enforce installRequirements => pipPins (Impact-Pack/kjnodes/Frame-Interpolation currently unpinned) so the shared venv is deterministic (prevents the next MPI-217). Existing hooks verified: shell.js _bootApp L235-263; engine.js repair-deps L560 (targeted set reinstall, no wipe). Surfaced by MPI-221.
